signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.description: Please fill out the form below to create an account.

dailyTip.title: Tip of the day
dailyTip.text: Regular walks are essential for your pet's physical and mental health. Aim for at least 30 minutes of activity daily to keep them happy, healthy, and well-behaved. Don't forget to bring water and treats!

validations.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
validations.passwordPattern: Password must contain at least one letter and one number
